title: UPSC Editorial Analysis: LPG Crisis in India
description: General Studies-3; Topic: Infrastructure: Energy, Ports, Roads, Airports, Railways etc.   Introduction The recent disruptions in the LPG supply chain, often referred to as the “LPG Crunch,” have highlighted the fragile balance between India’s energy security, fiscal health, and social welfare goals.
